reasoning: The Chatbot Arena leadership is highly contested among OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and xAI. As of August 2025, OpenAI's GPT-5 reportedly held the top position, displacing Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro which took the lead in May. However, the leap to GPT-5 was reportedly smaller than expected, leaving it vulnerable to being overtaken. Google is expected to release its highly anticipated Gemini Ultra later in 2025, having seemingly held it back to respond to OpenAI's releases. A December release (similar to previous Gemini launches) could give Google the top spot by December 31. That said, new releases take time to accumulate Elo points on the Leaderboard, and competitors (OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI) could also drop late-year updates. Considering the four-way race, Google having a promising upcoming flagship release, but OpenAI currently defending the top spot, I estimate Google has approximately a 30% chance to be #1 on December 31, 2025.
batch_queries: LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard current ranking Google Gemini vs OpenAI Anthropic
Google Gemini upcoming AI model releases roadmap 2025
OpenAI Orion GPT-5 release date rumors 2025
expert forecasts top AI model Chatbot Arena end of 2025
